g,b in ipairs({{741454-741453;-551203+551878},{-37102+37103,466814+-466159},{707362+-706706,-151124-(-151799)}})do while b[-868707+868708]<b[-490707-(-490709)]do return(function(K,t,D,p,U,C,X,i,M,L,y,b,e,A,V,k,E,S,m,a,f,G,Q)a,A,b,k,f,G,M,Q,y,S,m,L,E,e,V,i=function(K,g)local t=L(g)local D=function(D,p,U,C,X)return b(K,{D;p,U,C,X},g,t)end return D end,function(K,g)local t=L(g)local D=function(D,p,U)return b(K,{D;p;U},g,t)end return D end,function(b,D,p,U)local
